title: Vanilla 3d Tools
description: Transform Minecraft's flat vanilla tools and utility items into immersive 3D models while preserving the original Minecraft aesthetic.
body:
![Vanilla 3d Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04b1b6f4d2d69b08577d370081cf56a87747c0fd.png)

##  📖 Overview

Vanilla 3D Tools is a lightweight resource pack designed to enhance Minecraft's visual experience by replacing flat item models with detailed 3D versions.

The pack maintains Minecraft's iconic vanilla textures and art style while adding depth and realism to tools and utility items, making them feel more immersive during gameplay.

Whether you're mining, building, exploring, or battling mobs, your equipment will look more polished without sacrificing the familiar vanilla appearance.

## ✨ Features

🔹 Vanilla-friendly 3D models
🔹 Preserves original Minecraft textures
🔹 Enhanced visual depth and immersion
🔹 Improved item presentation in inventories and gameplay
🔹 Lightweight and performance-friendly
🔹 Seamlessly integrates with the vanilla aesthetic
🔹 Designed for everyday survival and adventure gameplay

## 🎮 Recommended For

• Vanilla+ Players
• Survival Worlds
• Adventure Maps
• PvP Players
• Content Creators & Screenshot Enthusiasts
• Anyone looking for improved visuals without changing Minecraft's style

## 📦 Included Content

🪓 Axes
⛏️ Pickaxes
🗡️ Swords
🔨 Tools & Utility Items

## 🖼️ Visual Enhancement

Vanilla 3D Tools focuses on adding depth and dimension to Minecraft's equipment while keeping everything instantly recognizable.

No unnecessary redesigns.

No over-the-top fantasy styling.

Just clean, polished 3D models that feel like they belong in vanilla Minecraft.

## ⚙️ Resolution

16x Vanilla Resolution

## ✅ Compatibility

✔ Minecraft Java Edition
✔ Vanilla-Friendly
✔ Multiplayer Compatible
✔ Works alongside most resource packs

## 👤 Credits

Creator

Resource Pack
